description.zh-Hant: 一次解鎖商稿角色、進階姿勢、構圖輔助、透明 PNG 與多視角輸出。
description.en-US: One-time unlock for editorial characters, advanced poses, composition guides, transparent PNG export, and multi-angle references.

review_note: The app displays the official StoreKit price returned by App Store Connect. Do not hard-code a price in app metadata or UI.
pricing_note: Set the final non-consumable price in App Store Connect before attaching this IAP to the app version for review.
